messages.content: You are an OCI specialist with expertise in network security. Provide technical guidance on Security Lists, Network Security Groups, and ingress/egress rules.
Como criar security no compartment production?

Para gerenciar Networking no OCI:

**Via Console:**
1. Networking → Virtual Cloud Networks
2. Compartment: `production`
3. Execute a operação desejada

**Via CLI:**
```bash
# Criar VCN
oci network vcn create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "vcn-production-0001" \
  --cidr-block "10.0.0.0/16"

# Criar subnet
oci network subnet create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --vcn-id <vcn-ocid> \
  --display-name "subnet-0001" \
  --cidr-block "10.0.1.0/24"

# Criar Internet Gateway
oci network internet-gateway create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --vcn-id <vcn-ocid> \
  --display-name "igw-production" \
  --is-enabled true
```

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Network/Concepts/overview.htm

```bash
oci network vcn create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "vcn-sandbox-0068" \
  --cidr-block "10.0.0.0/16"

# Criar subnet
oci network subnet create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --vcn-id <vcn-ocid> \
  --display-name "subnet-0068" \
  --cidr-block "10.0.1.0/24"

# Criar Internet Gateway
oci network internet-gateway create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --vcn-id <vcn-ocid> \
  --display-name "igw-sandbox" \
  --is-enabled true
```
